parameters.jsCode:
const contentArray = $input.first().json.content;

const transcript = contentArray.map(item => item.text).join(' ');
const youtubeUrl = $('extract_video_meta').first().json.youtube_url;

return [{

json: {

model: "claude-opus-4-6",

max_tokens: 1024,

messages: [
{
role: "user",
content: `Based on this YouTube transcript, generate social media posts. Return ONLY valid JSON with these keys: x_post, linkedin_post, image_prompt, hashtags.

ABOUT THE AUTHOR:

- 10+ years experience in tech, currently learning and exploring AI tools
- Indian, writes in simple conversational English (like how Indians talk in day-to-day life)
- Not a hardcore AI expert — more like a curious senior person sharing what they are discovering
- Audience: developers, founders, product managers, AI enthusiasts, and general public who are new to AI
- Goal: make AI concepts feel simple and approachable, not intimidating

TONE RULES (very important):

- Write like you are explaining to a friend over chai — warm, simple, relatable
- Use simple words, avoid jargon. If you must use a technical term, explain it in plain words
- It is okay to say things like "yaar", "basically", "simply put", "the thing is"
- Share it as a personal learning — "I came across this", "this got me thinking", "honestly this surprised me"
- No corporate speak. No "game-changer", "revolutionary", "leverage", "superpower"
- Sound like a real human, not a LinkedIn influencer

RULES FOR x_post:

- Max 220 chars (leave room for URL and hashtags)
- One surprising insight from the video, explained simply
- End with a genuine question to spark conversation
- Then on a new line add the hashtags
- Then on a new line append this URL: ${youtubeUrl}

RULES FOR linkedin_post:

- 3-5 short bullet points, each explaining one insight in plain simple language
- Start with a relatable hook — something everyone can connect with
- End with a question or call to action
- Then add hashtags on a new line
- Include the URL at the end: ${youtubeUrl}

RULES FOR image_prompt:

- Very detailed visual prompt for image generation
- Describe the scene, style, colors, mood, lighting, composition
- Mention specific visual elements related to the video topic
- Example style: "A detailed digital illustration of [topic], showing [specific elements], in [art style] style, with [color palette], [lighting description], [mood],
professional quality, 4K"
- Make it specific to THIS video's content, not generic

RULES FOR hashtags:

- Array of 5 relevant tags, mix of popular and niche

Transcript:

${transcript}`

}

]

}
}];

const raw = $input.first().json.content[0].text;                                                                                                                                 
  const cleaned = raw.replace(/^```json\s*/i, '').replace(/```\s*$/i, '').trim();                                                                                                  
  const parsed = JSON.parse(cleaned);                                                                                                                                              
  return [{ json: parsed }];

const url = $input.first().json.body.youtube_url;
const videoId = url.match(/(?:v=|youtu\.be\/)([^&\n?#]+)/)[1];                                               return [{ json: { videoId, youtube_url: url } }];

const response = $input.first().json;                                                                                                                           
  // Jina returns plain text — handle different response shapes                                                                                                 
  const articleText = typeof response === 'string' ? response                                                                                                     
    : response.data || response.body || response.content || JSON.stringify(response);
                                                                                                                                                                  
  const articleUrl = $('Webhook-article').first().json.body.article_url;                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                  
  return [{                                                                                                                                                     
    json: {
      model: "claude-opus-4-6",
      max_tokens: 1024,
      messages: [                                                                                                                                                 
        {
          role: "user",                                                                                                                                           
          content: `Based on this article, generate social media posts. Return ONLY valid JSON with these keys: x_post, linkedin_post, image_prompt, hashtags.  
                                                                                                                                                                  
  ABOUT THE AUTHOR:
                                                                                                                                                                  
  - 10+ years experience in tech, currently learning and exploring AI tools                                                                                     
  - Indian, writes in simple conversational English (like how Indians talk in day-to-day life)
  - Not a hardcore AI expert — more like a curious senior person sharing what they are discovering                                                                
  - Audience: developers, founders, product managers, AI enthusiasts, and general public who are new to AI
  - Goal: make AI concepts feel simple and approachable, not intimidating                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                  
  TONE RULES (very important):
                                                                                                                                                                  
  - Write like you are explaining to a friend over chai — warm, simple, relatable                                                                               
  - Use simple words, avoid jargon. If you must use a technical term, explain it in plain words
  - It is okay to say things like "yaar", "basically", "simply put", "the thing is"                                                                               
  - Share it as a personal learning — "I came across this", "this got me thinking", "honestly this surprised me"
  - No corporate speak. No "game-changer", "revolutionary", "leverage", "superpower"                                                                              
  - Sound like a real human, not a LinkedIn influencer                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                  
  RULES FOR x_post:                                                                                                                                             

  - Max 220 chars (leave room for URL and hashtags)                                                                                                               
  - One surprising insight from the article, explained simply
  - End with a genuine question to spark conversation                                                                                                             
  - Then on a new line add the hashtags                                                                                                                         
  - Then on a new line append this URL: ${articleUrl}

  RULES FOR linkedin_post:                                                                                                                                        
   
  - 3-5 short bullet points, each explaining one insight in plain simple language                                                                                 
  - Start with a relatable hook — something everyone can connect with                                                                                           
  - End with a question or call to action
  - Then add hashtags on a new line
  - Include the URL at the end: ${articleUrl}                                                                                                                     
   
  RULES FOR image_prompt:                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                
  - Very detailed visual prompt for image generation
  - Describe the scene, style, colors, mood, lighting, composition
  - Mention specific visual elements related to the article topic
  - Example style: "A detailed digital illustration of [topic], showing [specific elements], in [art style] style, with [color palette], [lighting description],  
  [mood], professional quality, 4K"
  - Make it specific to THIS article's content, not generic                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                  
  RULES FOR hashtags:
                                                                                                                                                                  
  - Array of 5 relevant tags, mix of popular and niche

  Article Content:

  ${articleText}`
        }
      ]
    }
  }];
